UCS-67  ALTERNATIVE RULES FOR MDMT REDUCTION. (a) The MDMT determined from UCS-66 may be further reduced when the coincident ratio (applied stress to allowable stress) is less than 1.0. (b) The reduction in MDMT shall be calculated from the figure in this paragraph using the stress ratio and the governing thickness. (c) This reduction is permitted only for materials exempt from impact testing under UCS-66. When impact testing is required by UCS-56, this paragraph does not apply. Design temperature shall be as established in UG-20. See also UG-84 for impact test requirements when exemption is not available.
